emails.subject: Re: Entex WACOG procedures
emails.body: I do not know the origin of the Btu factor as stated on the annual report. Can you respond to Dan on this? Forwarded by Steve -HPL- Schneider/HOU/ECT on 05/11/99 12:42 PM Enron Capital Trade Resources Corp. From: Dan J Hyvl 05/11/99 11:24 AM
